traps: gp3Throughput is a throughput-type field. The correct format is {"value": "<number>", "unit": "mbps"}. Do NOT use the options id from get_service_fields — the unit is always "mbps".
gp3Throughput minimum is 125 MBps (included in baseline), maximum is 2000 MBps. Only throughput above 125 MBps incurs additional cost.
gp3Iops minimum is 3000 (included in baseline), maximum is 80000. Only IOPS above 3000 incur additional cost.
storageType must be one of the full option IDs from the dropdown (e.g. "Storage General Purpose gp3 GB Mo"), not shorthand like "gp3".
snapshotFrequency uses numeric string IDs (e.g. "0" for no snapshots, "30" for daily, "729" for hourly) — not human-readable labels.

minimalConfig.storageType: Storage General Purpose gp3 GB Mo
